clauses.statement: execute merge workflow: when gh pr view reports state MERGED, the merge status state machine transitions resolving -> reconciling -> merged_externally after verifying the merge commit is an ancestor of origin/<base>, recording merge_commit_sha and merged_at.

execute merge workflow failure transition: a MERGED PR whose merge commit cannot be confirmed on origin/<base> transitions to the blocked status with stop_reason pr_merged_externally_unverified and never fabricates a merge record.

OPEN PR merge workflow keeps today's state transitions: preconditions gate the flow and the merged status is only reached after gh pr merge succeeds; the reconcile path never changes OPEN-PR behavior.

design-ssot init status flow reports registry totals derived from the post-write registry state (design_root_count, child_link_count) for fresh and multi-root registries, and re-init of an existing id does not inflate the counts.
merged_externally is only reported when the externally merged commit is confirmed reachable from the locally fetched origin/<base>; gh output alone is never trusted for the merge record.

diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> resolving
    resolving --> blocked : preconditions fail (OPEN)
    resolving --> merging : OPEN and preconditions pass
    merging --> merged : gh pr merge ok
    merging --> failed : gh_merge_failed
    resolving --> reconciling : state == MERGED
    reconciling --> merged_externally : merge commit on origin/base
    reconciling --> blocked : pr_merged_externally_unverified
    merged --> [*]
    merged_externally --> [*]
    blocked --> [*]
    failed --> [*]

flowchart LR
  View[gh pr view] --> Branch{state}
  Branch -->|OPEN| Preconditions[preconditions -> gh pr merge -> merged]
  Branch -->|MERGED| MergedView[merged view fetch]
  MergedView --> Verify{ancestor of origin/base}
  Verify -->|yes| Reconciled[merged_externally + post-merge pipeline]
  Verify -->|no| Unverified[blocked pr_merged_externally_unverified]

flowchart LR
  Spoof[spoofed merged claim from gh output] --> Verify[local git merge-base --is-ancestor check against fetched origin/base]
  Fabricate[risk of fabricated merge record] --> FailClosed[unverified external merge stays blocked; sha never invented]
  Downgrade[risk of weakening OPEN gating] --> Scope[reconcile only on state==MERGED dead-end path]
  Registry[init misreporting registry contents] --> Honest[totals from post-write registry via buildRegistrySummary]
